reasoning: The FedRAMP IA-2 control focuses on identification and authentication for organizational users, which maps to Kubernetes through the configuration of authentication mechanisms and RBAC. Kubernetes supports OIDC for user authentication, which can be configured to enforce strong identity verification similar to MFA in cloud IAM systems. Service account token automounting should be disabled to prevent unauthorized access. Ensuring the API server has authentication enabled and is using RBAC for authorization aligns with enforcing strong access controls.
title: Identification and Authentication (organizational Users)
